nasb.text: But I was like a gentle lamb led to the slaughter; And I did not know that they had devised plots against me, saying, “Let us destroy the tree with its fruit, And let us cut him off from the land of the living, That his name be remembered no more.”

esv.text: But I was like a gentle lamb led to the slaughter. I did not know it was against me they devised schemes, saying, “Let us destroy the tree with its fruit, let us cut him off from the land of the living, that his name be remembered no more.”

cnv.text: 至於我，我卻像一隻馴良的羊羔，被牽到屠宰之地；我並不知道他們設計謀害我。他們說： “我們來把這樹和果子都毀滅吧， 把它從活人之地剪除， 使它的名不再被人記念。”

ccb.text: 我好像一只被牵去宰杀的驯良羊羔，不知他们要谋害我。他们说： “我们把这棵树连果子一同毁灭， 从世上除掉它， 使它被遗忘吧！”
